default.subject: Your MyGlobalTrips quote for {{destination}}
default.html:
MyGlobalTrips Luxury Travel Proposal

Dear {{name}},

Thank you for choosing MyGlobalTrips for your upcoming journey to {{destination}}.

Based on your travel dates {{dates}}, traveller count {{travellers}}, and preferred budget {{budget}}, we recommend a curated luxury package with premium hotels, private transfers, handpicked experiences, and visa-ready guidance.

Special requests: {{requests}}

  • Luxury accommodation options
  • Private airport transfers
  • Curated experiences and dining
  • Visa checklist support
  • Dedicated travel concierge

Warm regards,
MyGlobalTrips Concierge
